raw_consumer_statement:
On or about XXXX XX/XX/2024, I made a purchse from XXXX on XXXX with my American Express card using a combination of points and credit. I canceled the purchase with XXXX prior to it being shipped by the merchant, on or about XXXX XX/XX/2024. The product was shipped anyway, on or about XXXX XX/XX/2024. The purchased reached and was held at the XXXX distribution center on or about XXXX XX/XX/2024. 

On or about XXXX XX/XX/2024, I filed a dispute with American Express, who immediately placed my points and a credit back on my account. When XXXX disputed my charge back, American Express reversed the credit. I still have not received the unwanted item, nor a refund of my points and charged amount. 

XXXX said they could not refund with an active dispute, but American Express said that their refund would have closed an active charge back. American Express said XXXX was paid and the dispute closed. 

XXXX said it would reach out to the seller and resolve the issue by Friday XXXX, XX/XX/2024. On XXXX XX/XX/2024, the merchant refunded about {$240.00} of a {$720.00} charge. XXXX said they had no role except to reach out to merchant, but XXXX reached out to American Express. 

American Express is saying they have no role, but it was American Express who reversed the charge back at the request of XXXX without an investigation, which would have demonstrated the item was canceled and never received. If I never received the item, I should not owe the money. My points and charges should be reversed. 

XXXX, can not provide a partial refund, because they shipped an item after cancelation, also when there were no terms and conditions for such withholding of funds with a return written on the site.
